# 07 — Real-world Flask Analysis

Coming soon. This tutorial points COGANT at a realistic Flask-style web
application and walks through the `ProgramGraph`, role distribution, and
role-specific node lists produced by the forward pipeline.

> **Background:** The role vocabulary (OBSERVATION / ACTION / CONSTRAINT /
> STATE) is defined in [role assignment](../concepts/role_assignment.md), and the
> [program graph](../concepts/program_graph.md) page explains the node and edge
> kinds you will see when inspecting a decorator-heavy framework module.
> A guided walkthrough of the same fixture (without the notebook harness) is
> in the [Flask App Walkthrough](../tutorials/03_flask_walkthrough.md).

See [related docs](../index.md) for now.
